researched_category.notes: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery platform for transactional and marketing emails, acquired by Twilio.

one_liner.value: Cloud-based email delivery platform providing transactional and marketing email services via REST API and SMTP

methods.notes: Primary method is API key sent as Bearer token in Authorization header. Also supports Basic auth with username 'apikey' and API key as password for some legacy services. Username/password Basic auth was deprecated in Q4 2020.

access.notes: Free 60-day trial with 100 emails/day, no credit card required. Developer can sign up and get API key immediately. After trial, Essentials plan starts at $19.95/mo.

summary.value: SendGrid v3 Web API is a comprehensive public REST API documented at api.sendgrid.com. Covers Mail Send, Templates, Contacts & Lists, Marketing Campaigns, Statistics, IP Management, Subusers, Event Webhook, Inbound Parse Webhook, and more. OpenAPI specification is available on GitHub. Official SDKs in 7 languages.

agent_interface.notes: Multiple community MCP servers exist (Garoth/sendgrid-mcp with 27 stars, garethcull/sendgrid-mcp, recepyavuz0/sendgrid-mcp-server). Twilio published a community blog post on building a SendGrid MCP server. Composio has a SendGrid toolkit (364 tools). No official MCP server from Twilio.

rationale.value: SendGrid has a well-documented public REST API (v3), self-serve free trial signup with no credit card required, API key authentication that is straightforward for programmatic use, community MCP servers already exist, and Composio provides a toolkit. There are no substantive blockers for building an agent toolkit today.

s1.quote: The SendGrid v3 Web API provides a REST interface to send email at scale and ensure your application can handle high volumes.
s1.title: SendGrid v3 API reference

s2.quote: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery platform providing transactional and marketing email services, with APIs for integration, analytics, and scalability
s2.title: SendGrid - Composio Toolkit

s3.quote: Twilio SendGrid supports API keys delivered via Bearer token or Basic authentication... To use an API key, pass an Authorization header with a value of `Bearer <Your-API-Key-Here>`
s3.title: Authentication | SendGrid Docs

s4.quote: Your application, mail client, or website can all use API (Application Programming Interface) keys to authenticate access to SendGrid services.
s4.title: API Keys | SendGrid Docs

s5.quote: Free Trial $0/mo for 60 days. Send 100 emails/day. No credit card, no commitment.
s5.title: Email API Pricing | Twilio

s6.quote: A SendGrid account. If you don't have one, create it here. You will receive a 60-day free trial that allows up to 100 email sends per day.
s6.title: Build a SendGrid MCP Server for AI Email Workflows

s7.quote: The Twilio SendGrid Web REST API v3 provides SDKs for seven different languages.
s7.title: How to use the SendGrid V3 API

s9.quote: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides access to SendGrid's Marketing API for email marketing and contact management.
s9.title: Garoth/sendgrid-mcp

s10.quote: An open source Sendgrid MCP server that helps marketing teams pull email stats and save html templates to sendgrid using AI Models.
s10.title: garethcull/sendgrid-mcp

s11.quote: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with SendGrid API integration
s11.title: recepyavuz0/sendgrid-mcp-server

s12.quote: Securely connect your AI agents and chatbots (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc) with Sendgrid MCP or direct API to send emails, manage templates, check delivery status, and analyze engagement
s12.title: Sendgrid MCP Integration for AI Agents

s13.quote: SendGrid is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed to facilitate interaction between AI agents and the Twilio SendGrid v3 API.
s13.title: SendGrid AI Agent: Automate Your Email Marketing
